title: Causal Analysis Path
description: Build fluency in Causal Analysis inside Reinforcement Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Building Information Modeling AI
steps.summary: Building Information Modeling AI belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Causal Analysis. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Causal Analysis. Start after AI in Architecture and AI and Architecture.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Uplift modeling
steps.summary: Uplift modeling belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Causal Analysis. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Causal Analysis. Compare it with Opponent Modeling and Goal Modeling. It opens into Causal Uplift Modeling.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: belief modeling
steps.summary: belief modeling belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Causal Analysis. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Causal Analysis. Compare it with Uplift modeling and Opponent Modeling. It opens into Belief Modeling Agent.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Session-Based Modeling

steps.title: common ground modeling
steps.summary: common ground modeling belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Causal Analysis. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Causal Analysis. Compare it with Session-Based Modeling and Prosody modeling with FastPitch. It opens into Common Ground Modeling Agent.
